---
title: "About"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 12em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/leonnoirclerc
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/leonnoirclerc
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:leon.noirclerc@icloud.com
---

Hi, I'm Leon. I studied *Communication Systems* at **EPFL**, then *Data Science* with a focus on machine learning at **ETH Zürich**.

This blog is where I share personal projects, experiments, and notes from what I'm working on.

::: {.alumni-logos}
[![EPFL](logos/epfl.svg)](https://www.epfl.ch/)
[![ETH Zürich](logos/eth.svg)](https://ethz.ch/)
:::

```{=html}
<a class="about-link about-link-hf" href="https://huggingface.co/leonnoirclerc/activity/all" rel="" target="" hidden>
  <img src="logos/huggingface.svg" class="about-link-hf-logo" alt=""/>
  <span class="about-link-text">Hugging Face</span>
</a>

<script>
(function () {
  function move() {
    const entity = document.querySelector('.about-entity');
    if (!entity) return;
    const links = entity.querySelector('.about-links');

    const logos = document.querySelector('.alumni-logos');
    if (logos && links) {
      entity.insertBefore(logos, links);
    } else if (logos) {
      entity.appendChild(logos);
    }

    const hf = document.querySelector('.about-link-hf');
    if (hf && links) {
      hf.removeAttribute('hidden');
      links.appendChild(hf);
    }
  }
  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', move);
  } else {
    move();
  }
})();
</script>
```
